heading: View API (Application Programming Interface) Access List Entries for the API (Application Programming Interface) Key
body:
To list IP access list entries for your API key using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas organizations apiKeys accessLists list <apiKeyID> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas organizations apiKeys accessLists list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-organizations-apiKeys-accessLists-list).
